title: gatekit manifest
description: Schema for gatekit.json — the manifest file that tracks installed gates and managed/owned files.

packageManager.description: Package manager used in this repo

paths.description: Directory paths where gatekit files are vendored

scripts.description: Directory where script files are vendored (e.g. scripts/sentinel)

sentinel.description: Directory where sentinel/bot handler files live (e.g. .github/sentinel)

features.description: Map of feature name to feature configuration

installed.description: Map of relative file path to install record — used for drift detection and update semantics

featureConfig.description: Configuration for a single installed feature

mode.description: report: annotate PRs but always pass; block: fail the CI check on violations

installedFile.description: Install record for a single file

sha.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file contents at install time — used to detect local edits

type.description: managed: engine file overwritten by update; owned: policy file scaffolded once, never overwritten

version.description: Registry version string at install time (managed files only)
